coverage_note: The bundled NTRK1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from NTRK1 TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000198400: NTRK1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: NTRK1 findings should be read against TrkA neurotrophin receptor signaling through NGF, RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, PLC-gamma, pain pathways, and oncogenic fusions; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

NTRK1 fusion model is curated as a NTRK1 marker for NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology, Congenital insensitivity to pain review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

NTRK1 loss-of-function model is curated as a NTRK1 marker for NGF-TrkA neuronal survival and pain biology, Congenital insensitivity to pain review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
